chunks.text: The National Institute of Medicine in Tokyo is a cutting - edge lab.
The director is Dr.
Tanaka, the deputy is Dr.
Sato.
Today's affair is the final presentation of a joint research project.
Through collaboration with an American university, a new drug has been developed.
The secretary, Yamada - san, prepared the presentation.
The participants are male and female, in roughly equal numbers.
In the presentation, Dr.
Tanaka explained the properties of the new drug's liquid compound.
Even a tiny unit for experiments has effect, with few side effects.
The new drug was developed for cancer patients in an abortion crisis of time.
The terms of the clinical trial were strict, conducted over two years.
The participants' data was arranged in string - like graphs and projected on slides.
The researchers stare at the screen.
For transport of the drug load, steel containers are used.
Temperature control is important.
The graduate pupil of the lab also contributed to this achievement.
Maybe in a few years, they will be the next leaders.
Dr.
Tanaka, with a wan smile, said, " This drug will save many lives.
I want to thank the research team who deserve the credit.
After the meeting, the participants headed towards the hotel for the dinner gathering.
Science advances through the power of ally.
